summary: Backend testing completed for CBE Lesson Planner curriculum data seeding. All 33 tests passed. Verified 5 new KICD curriculum subjects were correctly seeded: Business Studies, CRE, Electrical Technology, Fine Arts, and French.
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints for subjects, strands, substrands, and SLOs require Firebase authentication - cannot be tested without valid credentials
Lesson plan generation endpoint uses learning activities from the new seeded data correctly
test_credentials: Firebase authentication required - no test credentials available
seed_data_creation: Not applicable - verified existing seeded data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend curriculum data seeding verified via direct MongoDB queries. All 5 new subjects (Business Studies, CRE, Electrical Technology, Fine Arts, French) are correctly seeded with expected strands, substrands, SLOs, and learning activities. Database totals: 22 subjects, 60 strands, 235 substrands, 898 SLOs, 89 learning activities. API endpoints require Firebase auth for testing. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_curriculum_seeding.py can be reused for regression testing.
